reasoning: Elon Musk and Starlink representatives announced on April 13, 2025, that Starlink had obtained an operating license in Somalia and that the service was “now available”. Historically, when Starlink is officially announced as 'now available' by Musk following a licensing agreement, the Starlink Availability Map reflects this status (light blue) almost immediately. Because the question specifies a deadline of July 1, 2025, there is ample time for the map to formally display the 'Available' status even if it experienced minor delays. The combination of official licensing from the Somali government and Musk's explicit confirmation makes a YES resolution overwhelmingly likely.
